name: Reuben Meatloaf
recipeIngredient: 2 slices Rye or whole grain bread, cubed
1/4 cup Thousand Island dressing (or combine mayonnaise, catsup, and chopped onion)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bread cubes and water.
2. Stir in ground beef, egg, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Place half of the meat mixture along the bottom and sides of a loaf pan.
4. Cover with sauerkraut, salad dressing, and cheese.
5. Shape remaining meat into a large patty and cover the loaf, sealing the sides.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45-60 minutes or microwave on high for 12-14 minutes.
7. Let the meatloaf stand for 5-10 minutes before serving.
8. Serves 4-6.
